individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college ever.

content.Placements: The total number of students for my branch is about 400. The mecha-related companies like Tata Hyundai etc. My branch is very good as compared to other branches. Likely 75 percent of students get placements from campus. They offer us the best companies and internships.
content.Infrastructure: The best labs and classrooms are provided by our college. It also provides Wi Fi and the library is best. The college hostel is also best and they provide good quality food. Medical facilities are also good and provide shelter. Infrastructure is also good. It provides 24 hour electricity.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sanjivani K.B.P. Polytechnic.

content.Placements: I am a diploma in mechatronics student from Sanjivani K.B.P. Polytechnic. Our course has a good placement record, but I don't know the exact percentage of students who get placed. The highest, the lowest, and average packages offered are also not specified. Top companies like Schneider Electric, Kalokhe RCM, and Kirloskar visit the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has well-equipped labs with all the necessary equipment and tools like robotics kits, microcontrollers, sensors, and programming software. We also have a dedicated workshop area where we can work on our projects. The library has a vast collection of books, generals, and online resources related to mechatronics accessible anytime.

individual_reviews.title: Sanjeevani KBP Polytechnic has a well-rounded technical education with a strong industry exporter.

content.Placements: Placement statistics for mechanical engineering courses are approximately 70.99%. Students are secure placements with a package of 6 LPA, and average package is 3 LPA. Many top recruitment companies like Rinkus Aqua, LNT, defence, and Wipro rate is approximately 40.6 10%.
content.Infrastructure: Sanjivani KBP Polytechnic provides a comprehensive range of facilities to support both academic and extracurricular activities. There is a playground. All the sports are available. Laboratories, classrooms, practical halls, hands-on experiments mechatronics are there. I will get the knowledge of more than in the other branches, it is a hybrid branch.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Well-equipped campus with good academics & extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: About 95% of students have been placed from diploma in mechatronics. The lowest package is 1 LPA and the highest package is 3.6 LPA. The recruiting companies are MIDIEA and OEN. Most students have been placed in companies like MIDIEA and OEN, and some of them are selected for internships at Clicker Services Pvt. Ltd.
content.Infrastructure: Sanjivani K.B.P. Polytechnic offers a comprehensive range of facilities to support both academic and extracurricular activities. Laborataries are available and each lab has network access. In each classroom there is a projector. The quality of food in mess is good. There are 4-5 canteens on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sanjivani K.B.P. Polytechnic.

content.Placements: Our department has 100% placement records. The average salary package offered is 1.9 LPA. Many small and large scale industries visit our college to recruit students like OEN, etc. Our college provides good placements. There was no percentage criteria.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent, featuring a clean campus and well-equipped labs. Wi-Fi is not available for students throughout the campus, it is accessible in the labs through ethernet, and the connection works well. The labs are spacious enough for one batch of students. Additionally, there are five canteens on campus, so we don’t need to go off-site for meals.

placement_data.title: Sanjivani Group of Institutes Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The institute has a Central Corporate Relations, Training and Placement Cell that ensures placement assistance to every student. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The placement cell is also responsible for conducting on-campus placement drives and organizing various activities such as industry visits, live projects, workshops, mock interviews, and specialized training sessions.

Sanjivani Group of Institutes has concluded the placements for the batch passed out in 2024 . The participating recruiters presented various job offers to the students of different courses like MBA , BTech , BPharma , etc. The highest package offered during Sanjivani Group of Institutes placements in 2024 stood at INR 27 LPA . The average package offered in 2024 ranged between INR 5.5 LPA and INR 6 LPA. The top recruiters of Sanjivani Group of Institutes in 2024 included IBM, Persistent System, Trident Group, Wipro, Infosys , and many others.

overview_faqs.answer: Prakasam Engineering College is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, UG Diploma, MCA, After 10th Diploma courses. review_summary.college_name: Prakasam Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Affordable College with Nice Infrastructure. #PEC.

content.Placements: As a final year student, I recently got placed where around 300 people were shortlisted based on their percentage and 70 students including me got the offer letter. That's around 25 percent of placements and many other companies are also visiting our college in the upcoming days till now. Companies like IBM and Allsec Technologies have visited so far and many number of students got placed. Till now, the highest package is 4 LPA and the lowest is 2LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The Infrastructure of college is very nice in terms of classrooms and labs, but there are also some minor defects such as some malfunctioning systems in labs and no Wi-Fi availability for students only internet is available and library is also nice with quiet environment. Studying area with sufficient systems is available for students use. But when it comes to hostel, the facilities are bare minimum and not so good. No cleanliness and no proper cleaning happens. Water tanks are filled with Algae not even suitable for drinking and many students were affected by skin problems. I recommend to take a room outside of college campus. Sports and games are nice, also NCC is a plus for our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Fests are so few. Placements are good. Teaching is perfect.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in 2023 in Computer Science and Technology. Wipro hired a lot of students in our college. The average package is 2 Lacs per annum. In our college, the maximum members are placed in college placements with an average package, suggesting our college for good campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi availability in our college for first-year students. Classrooms are under CC camera surveillance all the time. The library is available during college hours. Classrooms have projectors to explain programming languages. In the mess, the food is average, lunch is good, and dinner is not good. The canteen opens at 8 am and closes at 9 pm. Canteen products are good, and the food is good; prices are moderate. All games and sports are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because our college management is too good.

content.Placements: Nearly 70–75 percent of students were placed in our course. That's all credit goes to our college management. They are very supportive and encourage us during placement time. The highest package offered in my course is 8 LPA and the average package is 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college management provides all the basic facilities and infrastructure. All classrooms are very neat and clean, fully furnished, with transport facility, parking facilities, etc. There are three canteens available inside the campus and the food is also not bad in the canteens.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with faculty members of our college.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in our college. Our college provides good placements. It conducts good placement drives. Many companies visit our college and conduct placement drives. Many students got placed in our course. Many students got internships. Our college provided good placements in 2022.
content.Infrastructure: We have a good hostel. Our college provides good facilities. All washrooms are very good. The mess is very good. It provides very good food. The hostel rooms are very clean and good. The infrastructure of the hostel is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is well-maintained and has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: I am satisfied with this course. Above 70% of students got placed in companies. Our college provides good placements with an average salary package of 3.5 LPA - 6 LPA. Our college authorities support us to get placements.
content.Infrastructure: All hostels have a pleasant and friendly environment. They are hygienic. They provide good food every day. They take care of us. Students like to stay in hostels.
content.Faculty: All faculty members are very friendly. Their way of teaching is extremely high. They guide us very excellently in our exam preparations so that we can score very good marks. They teach subjects with live examples, so students can understand easily.

review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Earlier it was good until 2016, but now it seems to be degrading. I don't recommend it to others.

content.Placements: Very few students, i.e., about 10% of the students from our CSE course get placed from our college. The highest salary package offered here is around 6 LPA. The lowest salary offered ranges from Rs. 12,000-15,000 per month. There is no such top recruiter or mass recruiter for our course. Students got internships, and some of them got them through our college, but most of them got through online platforms like Internshala and others. Majorly developers and software engineers roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi facility is available only for hostellers here. Labs are good, and classrooms are also good. There are good books in the library, but they are not updated. However, all students get books from the library, and they get books related to the course and other books also. The infrastructure of our college is average, and the campus is not huge but fine. Hostel rooms are quite huge, and the food served in the mess is fine. There is a menu for a week, which repeats. There is only one shop in the name of the canteen, and there is stationery, which is open during college time only. The hostel is very much far from the nearest market, i.e., about 3 km away. There is no transport facility, and even autos are not available. So, you have to walk 3 km or use your own vehicle. There is no medical support, but if any student has any issue, a quick transport facility is available to take them to the nearest hospital. Our college has one volleyball ground, a basketball court and a football field. There is a free gym for hostellers, which has average equipment, and the maintenance is not done on time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Not fully satisfied because of the faculty, and the placements were much better in 2015.

content.Placements: B.Tech in CSE is an amazing course to learn good coding and to be successful in life. This college is affiliated to Kurukshetra University, and the placements are somehow average with 40% of the students getting placed with 2 LPA package in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure provided to us are good. Facilities like good Wi-Fi, labs with a proper internet connection, A/C classrooms and a library with 3,500 books are available. The hostel mess and canteen are good. Sports kits are provided to us in the college.

During the Guru Nanak Institutions BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing rank was 324238 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Civil Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (Integrated) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I'm absolutely dissatisfied due to placements, but the course is good. The college is the worst.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, there are 10 to 20 students, and they all are academically average students. We visited industries like Coco-Cola and One Courier company where we learnt how they work. In our last semester, those companies visited our college for placements in which two or three students got selected, but the salary offered is not good, i.e., only Rs. 12,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, amenities like computer labs and library are good, but there are no proper teaching staff members for students so they can't ask their doubts or if you face any problem you have to wait for staff members to solve the same. In one week, many teachers joined here, but many of them left because of the salary issue. There are no hostel facilities and digital classrooms. There is no Wi-Fi facility on the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (Integrated) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides only a degree.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, there were 8 to 9 students, and out of which only 2 students get placed in Coca Cola company. The salary package offered to them were not so high. Even I didn't get any internship or placement. During the time of admission, the college ensures you that they will provide the best placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, no hostel was provided. The infrastructure was poor. Our classroom was like a normal classroom. There was no library on campus neither they the had its canteen. There was a third party who run the canteen, and he charges extra for items.

admission_process.title: Sri Venkateswara Institute of Science and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Venkateswara Institute of Science and Technology admission is entrance-based for its UG and PG courses. The college offers one course at the UG level, i.e., BTech, and two courses at the PG level, i.e., MTech and MBA. Admission to all the courses is open.Sri Venkateswara Institute of Science and Technologyoffers an online mode of application. Candidates can apply online by visiting the official website of the college to apply for admission. To know more about SVIST admission 2025, go through the following section:

Sri Venkateswara Institute of Science and Technology admission is ongoing for all courses. The college offers entrance-based admission to all courses. The college offers UG, and PG, courses, includingBTech, MTech andMBA. The duration of UG courses is four years. Further, the duration of MTech and MBA is two years.

To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The college accepts AP EAMCET scores for admission to BTech and CAT, XAT, APICET, AP PGECET, and GATE exam scores for admission to MBA and MTech, respectively. Sri Venkateswara Institute of Science and Technology admission process contains various steps, including registration, selection, and fee payment for final seat confirmation. Admission is open for all courses. Given below are the step-by-step details for Sri Venkateswara Institute of Science and Technology admission 2025:STEP 1: SVIST Application Process 2025Candidates must fill out the Sri Venkateswara Institute of Science and Technology admission eligibility criteria and selection criteria for BTech, MTech and MBA courses. After that, candidates are required to fill out the application form online on the official website of the college.STEP 2: SVIST Selection RoundSri Venkateswara Institute of Science and Technology offers admission to candidates for BTech, MTech and MBA based on AP EAMCET, AP PGECET, GATE, XAT, APICET and CAT respectively. Additionally, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria for a particular course to be eligible for admission.STEP 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee SubmissionFor final seat allotment, the college releases the merit list on its official website. After candidates get shortlisted based on their merits, they are required to pay the admission fee to lock in their seats.

Institute accepts the online application form for the various degree programs. Students will be trained for placements by third-party organizations for example FACE they provide company specific training to crack exams of MNC it helped me lot to crack TCS. This academic year students are placed in very good MNC's when we discuss campus's placemenrs we got companies like SPR, TECH MAHENDRA etc. The highest package in this academic year is 6.5. any further doubt contact our college TPO he will take care of rest.

reviews_list.review_title: Just have fun and improve your skills.

review_content.Placements: I will tell you about my personal experience. I did not get any jobs, but I was able to get one internship at Aaroniz Technology. Likewise, many students only get internships. 13 students get full-time jobs at Merkle, Infosys, MG Motors, and L&T-type MNC companies. The package offered is 4 lacs per year. If students invest their time and money, management needs to strengthen the placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is very beautiful, and we have a strict dress code for everyone. Classrooms without Wi-Fi should have plenty of windows and be located in a quiet area. I am a day scholar but my many friends live in flats near college, which are very affordable. Sports ground is big but no one plays sports because we have busy schedule.
